Observed in Phase 19:
- AetherSDR v26.5.2-compatible session shows the AMP pane after Flex radio-side amplifier injection.
- PGXL direct socket on TCP 9008 continues to accept connections and respond to info/status.
- AetherSDR Peripherals still reports PGXL Not connected while TGXL reports connected.
- Working hypothesis: the visible AMP pane is radio-side amplifier object driven; the Peripherals PGXL connected indicator may require additional PGXL direct status/capability fields not yet identified from source/transcripts.
